description: PR3 scenario #11 — canonical warm-start fixture. The exact-zero invariant from acceptance bar #4 holds on THIS fixture: identical-scenario re-run with warm-start enabled produces changes_from_baseline_count == 0. The broader scenario pack may drift by small explainable amounts, but this one is the hard contract.
notes: Acceptance-bar #4: the hard zero-change invariant only applies on this canonical fixture. Broader-pack fixtures may drift slightly provided every drift maps to an explainable cause (baseline infeasibility, rare tie-break drift). This split — hard test on one fixture, 'low and explainable' on the rest — was the ChatGPT amendment to the first DoR draft.
